description:
Imithetho yomgwaqo eQueensland yimithetho okumele bonke abasebenzisi bomgwaqo bayilalele.

 Abashayeli kumele balandele izimpawu zomgwaqo, izibani zomgwaqo, izimpawu zomgwaqo, kanye nemithetho yomgwaqo ngaso sonke isikhathi.

 Amaphoyisa kanye nabalawuli bezimoto abagunyaziwe banegunya elisemthethweni lokuqondisa izimoto.

 Uma isiqondiso esivela kumaphoyisa noma kumlawuli wezimoto singqubuzana nesibonakaliso noma isignali, isiqondiso kumele silandelwe.

 Ukwehluleka ukulalela isiqondiso esisemthethweni kuyicala.

Abashayeli banomthwalo wemfanelo ngokomthetho wokushayela ngokucophelela nangokuqaphela ngaso sonke isikhathi.

 Umshayeli akumelwe ashayele ngendlela yokunganaki, eyingozi, noma yokunganaki.

 Abashayeli kumele bathathe izinyathelo ezifanele zokugwema izingozi nokunciphisa ingozi kwabanye.

 Umshayeli unesibopho sokusebenza ngokuphephile kwemoto yakhe ngaphansi kwazo zonke izimo.

Ukuyeka indlela kusho ukwehlisa ijubane nokuma uma kudingeka ukuze kugwenywe ukushayisana.

 Abashayeli kumele bayeke lapho kudingeka izimpawu, imithetho yomgwaqo, noma izimo zethrafikhi.

 Umshayeli ongena emgwaqweni esuka endaweni yokungena, yokupaka izimoto, noma indlela yabahamba ngezinyawo kumele ayeke zonke izimoto nabahamba ngezinyawo.

 Ukwehluleka ukuyeka lapho kudingeka kuyicala.

Ezimpambanweni zemigwaqo, abashayeli kumele balalele izibani zomgwaqo, izimpawu, kanye nezimpawu zomgwaqo.

 Uma kungekho zimpawu noma izimpawu, abashayeli kumele banikezele ngokwemithetho yomgwaqo yaseQueensland.

 Abashayeli abajika ngakwesokudla kumele banikezele ithuba kubashayeli abazayo abaya ngqo noma abajika kwesobunxele.

 Abahamba ngezinyawo kumele nabo banikezwe kuqala lapho kudingeka khona.

 Isibani esiluhlaza sikuvumela ukuthi uqhubeke, kodwa kusamele unikeze indlela lapho kudingeka khona.

 Abashayeli kumele baqinisekise ukuthi ukujika kwe-U kungaqedwa ngokuphephile.

 Lapho bejika endaweni yokuhlangana kwemigwaqo, abashayeli kumele banikeze indlela abahambi ngezinyawo abawela umgwaqo abangena kuwo.

Abashayeli kumele banikeze ithuba izimoto eziphuthumayo ezisebenzisa izibani ezikhanyayo noma amasireni.

 Lezi zimpawu zisebenza ngemithetho ethile okumele abashayeli bayilandele kulezo zindawo.

Izimpawu zesikhashana zisetshenziselwa izimo ezifana nokusebenza komgwaqo, izingozi, noma imicimbi ekhethekile.

 Abashayeli kumele balalele izimpawu zesikhashana noma ngabe zihlukile kwezimpawu ezihlala njalo.

 Abashayeli kumele balalele le mikhawulo noma ngabe abasebenzi abakho.

Abashayeli kumele bashayele ngokucophelela nangokucophelela.

 Uma uzizwa ukhathele kakhulu, ungaphilile kahle, noma ungakufanele ukushayela ngokuphepha, kufanele uyeke ukushayela bese uphumula ngaphambi kokuba uqhubeke.
Uma uhileleke engozini ebangela ukulimala noma ukufa, kufanele ume, usize uma kungenzeka, futhi uxhumane nezinsizakalo eziphuthumayo ngokushesha.
Ngaphambi kokushayela, umshayeli unesibopho sokuqinisekisa ukuthi imoto ikulungele ukuba semgwaqweni futhi iphephile ukuyisebenzisa.

Ingozi kumele ibikwe emaphoyiseni uma kukhona ukulimala, ukufa, noma umonakalo omkhulu wempahla.

Ngemva kwengozi encane engenazo izingozi, abashayeli kumele bame futhi bashintshisane ngemininingwane nomunye umuntu ohilelekile.
Uma ukubona kwakho kuphazamiseka ngenkathi ushayela, kufanele uyeke ukushayela kuze kube yilapho kuphephile ukuqhubeka.
Uma omunye umshayeli ephuma endaweni yengozi, kufanele ubike lesi sigameko emaphoyiseni ngokushesha okukhulu.

category: Izindawo Zokuhlangana, Amajika kanye Nezindawo Zokuzungeza
description:
Esigcawini esingalawuleki, umshayeli kumele anikezele indlela ezimotweni ezisondela ngakwesokudla.

 Lo mthetho usebenza uma kungekho zibani zomgwaqo, izimpawu zokuma, noma izimpawu zendlela.

 Esigcawini se-T, umshayeli osemgwaqweni ophelayo kumele anikezele indlela ezimotweni ezisemgwaqweni oqhubekayo.

 Uma ungena emgwaqweni usuka endaweni yokungena noma endleleni yabahamba ngezinyawo, umshayeli kumele anikezele indlela kuzo zonke izimoto nabahamba ngezinyawo emgwaqweni.

category: Izindawo Zokuhlangana, Amajika kanye Nezindawo Zokuzungeza
description:
Uma ujika ngakwesobunxele endaweni yokuhlangana kwemigwaqo, abashayeli kumele banikeze indlela abahamba ngezinyawo abawela umgwaqo abangena kuwo.

 Uma ujika ngakwesokudla endaweni yokuhlangana kwemigwaqo, abashayeli kumele banikeze indlela izimoto ezizayo ezihamba phambili noma ezijika ngakwesobunxele.

 Uma ujika u-U, umshayeli kumele anikeze zonke ezinye izimoto kanye nabahamba ngezinyawo ithuba.

 Ngaphambi kokujika endaweni yokuhlangana kwemigwaqo, abashayeli kumele babonise futhi bahlole ukuthi kukhona yini ithrafikhi, abagibeli bamabhayisikili kanye nabahamba ngezinyawo.

category: Izindawo Zokuhlangana, Amajika kanye Nezindawo Zokuzungeza
description:
Uma bengena ku-roundabout, abashayeli kumele banikezele ngemoto ithuba.

 Abashayeli kumele banikezele ngesibonakaliso kwesobunxele lapho bephuma ku-roundabout ukuze bazise abanye abasebenzisi bomgwaqo ngenhloso yabo yokuhamba.

 Abashayeli kufanele basondele ku-roundabout ngesivinini esibavumela ukuthi banikezele ngesivinini ngokuphepha futhi bame uma kudingeka.

Umugqa owodwa ophakathi oqhubekayo usho ukuthi abashayeli akumelwe bawele noma bahambe ngezinyawo.

 Ukuwela kuvunyelwe kuphela ezimweni ezilinganiselwe kakhulu, njengokungena noma ukuphuma endaweni uma kuvunyelwe.

 Umugqa ophakathi ophukile ubonisa ukuthi abashayeli bangawela umugqa uma kuphephile ukwenza kanjalo.

 Lokhu kuvame ukusetshenziselwa ukudlula noma ukujika.

 Umugqa ophakathi oqhubekayo ophindwe kabili usho ukuthi abashayeli akumelwe bawele noma bahambe ngezinyawo ngezinyawo ngaphansi kwanoma yiziphi izimo.

 Imigqa emhlophe enqenqemeni imaka unqenqema lomgwaqo futhi isize abashayeli ukuhlonza indawo ekwazi ukuthuthwa emgwaqweni.

Ukudlula imoto akuvunyelwe noma nini lapho kungaphephile noma lapho izimpawu noma izimpawu zomgwaqo zikuvimbela.

 Abashayeli kumele bahlale behlola ukubonakala kanye nezimoto ezizayo ngaphambi kokudlula imoto.

 Umshayeli odlula imoto unesibopho esiphelele sokuqinisekisa ukuthi ukuhamba kungaqedwa ngokuphephile.

 Lapho bedlula umuntu ogibele ibhayisikili, abashayeli kumele bavumele indawo eyanele eceleni ukuqinisekisa ukuphepha komgibeli webhayisikili.

Ngaphambi kokushintsha imizila, abashayeli kumele babonise inhloso yabo futhi banikeze izimoto ezivele zisemgwaqweni abaya kuwo.

 Umzila ophawulwe ngophawu lwebhayisikili ubonisa umzila webhayisikili ogcinelwe abagibeli bamabhayisikili.

 Abashayeli akumele bashayele emzileni webhayisikili ngaphandle kokuthi kuvunyelwe.

 Imizila yamabhasi ephawulwe ngezimpawu nezimpawu zomgwaqo ingasetshenziswa kuphela yizimoto ezivunyelwe.

 Abashayeli kumele balalele izikhathi zokusebenza eziboniswe ezimpawini.

Ukupaka eduze kakhulu nekhoneni akuphephile ngoba kuvimbela imigqa yokubona yabashayeli nabahamba ngezinyawo.

 Ukupaka ohlangothini olungafanele lomgwaqo ubheke eceleni kwethrafikhi akuphephile futhi kungase kungabi semthethweni ezimweni eziningi.

 Ukuma noma ukupaka endaweni yokuwela abahamba ngezinyawo akuvunyelwe ngoba kubeka engozini abahamba ngezinyawo futhi kuvimbela ukubonakala.

Ngaphambi kokuvula umnyango wakho ngemva kokupaka eduze kwethrafikhi, kufanele uhlole izibuko nezindawo ezingabonakali.

 Lokhu kusiza ukuvimbela ukushayisana nezimoto, abagibeli bamabhayisikili, noma abanye abasebenzisi bomgwaqo.

 Esibonakalisweni sokuma, abashayeli kumele bame ngokuphelele emgqeni wokuma noma ngaphambi kokungena empambanweni yemigwaqo.

 Kufanele ubuyisele emuva noma ulungise indawo ezibanini zomgwaqo kuphela uma kuphephile futhi kungababeki engozini abanye abasebenzisi bomgwaqo.

category: Abahamba Ngezinyawo, Abahamba Ngebhayisikili kanye Nabasebenzisi Bemigwaqo Abasengozini
description:
Ezindaweni zokuwela abahamba ngezinyawo ezingenazo izibani zomgwaqo, abashayeli abasondela endaweni yokuwela kumele banikeze indlela abahamba ngezinyawo abasendleleni noma abangena endaweni yokuwela.

 Ezindaweni zokuwela izimoto, abashayeli kumele banikeze indlela abahamba ngezinyawo abanesiginali esiluhlaza sokuhamba.

category: Abahamba Ngezinyawo, Abahamba Ngebhayisikili kanye Nabasebenzisi Bemigwaqo Abasengozini
description:
Uma bedlula umgibeli webhayisikili, abashayeli kumele bavumele indawo eyanele eceleni ukuqinisekisa ukuphepha komgibeli webhayisikili.

 Abagibeli bebhayisikili bangabasebenzisi bomgwaqo abasemthethweni futhi bangagibela emgwaqweni, emizileni yamabhayisikili, noma ezindleleni ezihlanganyelwe lapho kuvunyelwe khona.

category: Abahamba Ngezinyawo, Abahamba Ngebhayisikili kanye Nabasebenzisi Bemigwaqo Abasengozini
description: Ezindaweni ezihlanganyelwe, abahamba ngezinyawo babaluleke kakhulu kunezimoto futhi abashayeli kumele bahambe ngesivinini esiphansi kakhulu.

category: Abahamba Ngezinyawo, Abahamba Ngebhayisikili kanye Nabasebenzisi Bemigwaqo Abasengozini
description:
Abahamba ngezinyawo asebekhulile noma abakhubazekile bangase bahambe kancane noma babe nokuqwashisa okuncane, okudinga abashayeli ukuba banikeze isikhathi esengeziwe nendawo.

 Lapho besondela kwabahamba ngezinyawo benenduku emhlophe noma inja eqondisa abantu, abashayeli kufanele behlise ijubane futhi balungele ukuma.

Uma ushayela emvuleni enkulu, abashayeli kufanele banciphise isivinini futhi bandise ibanga elilandelayo.

 Imvula inciphisa ukubonakala kanye nokubamba amathayi, yandisa amabanga okuma.

 Ukushayela emanzini akhukhula kuyingozi ngoba ukujula nesimo somgwaqo kungase kungaziwa.

 Amanzi akhukhula angageza izimoto noma afihle umonakalo womgwaqo.

 Inkungu inciphisa kakhulu ukubonakala.

 Abashayeli kufanele behlise ijubane, basebenzise izibani zangaphambili eziphansi, futhi balungele ukuma.

 Imimoya enamandla ingathinta ukuzinza kwezimoto, ikakhulukazi ezimotweni ezisemaceleni aphezulu.

 Abashayeli kufanele banciphise isivinini futhi balondoloze ukulawula okuqinile kokuqondisa.

 Ukuphotha emanzini kwenzeka lapho amathayi elahlekelwa ukuthintana nobuso bomgwaqo ngenxa yamanzi.

 Abashayeli kufanele banciphise ama-pedal futhi bashayele kahle uma lokhu kwenzeka.

Emigwaqweni yasemakhaya, izilwane zingangena emgwaqweni ngokungazelelwe.

 Abashayeli kufanele bahlale beqaphile futhi balungele ukwehlisa ijubane noma ukuma.

 Ukushayela ebusuku emigwaqweni yasemakhaya kuyingozi ngenxa yokuncipha kokubonakala kanye nokwanda kwemisebenzi yezilwane zasendle.

 Uma isilwane sivela ngokuzumayo emgwaqweni, abashayeli kufanele babhuleke ngokuqinile futhi bashayele ngokuphepha ngaphandle kokujika ngendlela eyingozi.

Uma besondela emisebenzini yomgwaqo, abashayeli kumele balalele izimpawu zesikhashana kanye nemikhawulo yesivinini encishisiwe.

 Le mithetho iyasebenza noma abasebenzi bengabonakali.

 Imikhawulo yesivinini yesikhashana emisebenzini yomgwaqo ikhona ukuvikela abasebenzi kanye nabasebenzisi bomgwaqo.

 Abashayeli akumele badlule kule mikhawulo.

Uma imoto yezimo eziphuthumayo isondela isebenzisa izibani ezikhanyayo noma ama-siren, abashayeli kumele basuke endleleni ngokuphepha futhi bayivumele idlule.

 Emigwaqweni enemizila eminingi, abashayeli kufanele babonise futhi basuke baye emzileni ocacile noma ngakwesobunxele lapho kungenzeka khona ukuze bavumele izimoto zezimo eziphuthumayo zidlule.

 Uma imiswa ezibanini zomgwaqo futhi imoto yezimo eziphuthumayo isondela ngemuva, abashayeli bangahamba ngokucophelela badlule umugqa wokuma uma kuphephile ukwenza kanjalo.

 Abashayeli akumelwe bavimbe indlela yemoto yezimo eziphuthumayo, kungakhathaliseki uhlobo lomgwaqo noma izimo zethrafikhi.

 Uma ungakwazi ukushelela eceleni ngokushesha ukuze uthole imoto yezimo eziphuthumayo, qhubeka ushayela ngokuphepha uze ukwazi ukuma ngaphandle kokudala ingozi.

 Uma udlula imoto yezimo eziphuthumayo emisiwe enezibani ezikhanyayo, abashayeli kufanele behlise ijubane futhi baqhubeke ngokuqapha.

Abashayeli kumele balalele iziqondiso ezinikezwa ngamaphoyisa noma abalawuli bezimoto abagunyaziwe, noma ngabe zingqubuzana nezimpawu zomgwaqo noma izimpawu.

 Iphoyisa noma umlawuli wezimoto ogunyaziwe unegunya elisemthethweni lokuqondisa izimoto ngendlela ehlukile kunezimpawu noma izimpawu.

 Uma amaphoyisa ekuyala ukuthi ume, ujike, uphambuke, noma ume eceleni, kufanele ulandele ngokuphepha nangokushesha okukhulu.

 Ukwehluleka ukulandela iziqondiso zamaphoyisa ezisemthethweni kuyicala futhi kungabangela izinhlawulo, amaphuzu okulahlekelwa, noma ukumiswa kwelayisensi.

category: Amabhande Esihlalo, Izivimbelo Zezingane kanye Nabagibeli
description:
EQueensland, umshayeli unesibopho ngokomthetho sokuqinisekisa ukuthi bonke abagibeli abangaphansi kweminyaka engu-16 ubudala bagqoka ibhande lesihlalo noma ibhande elivunyelwe.

 Amabhande esihlalo kumele agqokwe ngaso sonke isikhathi lapho imoto ihamba uma ibhande lesihlalo lifakwe.

 Ibhande lesihlalo kufanele ligqokwe ngokuqinile ehlombe nasezansi ezinqeni ukuze kuncishiswe ingozi yokulimala engozini.

 Amabhande esihlalo akufanele agqokwe ngendlela engafanele, njengangaphansi kwengalo noma asontekile, njengoba lokhu kwandisa kakhulu ingozi yokulimala okukhulu.

category: Amabhande Esihlalo, Izivimbelo Zezingane kanye Nabagibeli
description:
Izinsana kumele ziboshwe ngebhande lengane elibheke ngemuva elivunyiwe ngoba linikeza isivikelo esingcono kakhulu sekhanda nentamo.

 Izingane kufanele zisuke esihlalweni sokuphakamisa ziye ebhandeni lesihlalo lomuntu omdala kuphela uma zihlangabezana nezidingo ezisemthethweni zobudala nosayizi.

 Ibhande lengane kumele lifakwe kahle futhi lilungiswe kahle ngoba ukufakwa okungalungile kunciphisa kakhulu isivikelo lapho kwenzeka ingozi.

category: Amabhande Esihlalo, Izivimbelo Zezingane kanye Nabagibeli
description:
Abagibeli abangalawuleki bangalimala kakhulu noma babangele ukulimala kwabanye engozini ngenxa yokunyakaza okungalawuleki.

 Uma umgibeli ephazamisa umshayeli, isinyathelo esiphephile ukumcela ukuthi ayeke ukuze umshayeli akwazi ukugxila ekushayeleni ngokuphepha.

 Abagibeli kufanele bahlole njalo ithrafikhi kanye nabagibeli bamabhayisikili ngaphambi kokuvula iminyango yezimoto ukuze bavimbele ukushayisana nokulimala.

category: Ukuphepha Kwezimoto, Amaphutha kanye Nezisekelo Zokulungisa
description:
Amathayi angakhuphuki ngokwanele anciphisa ukuphathwa futhi andise ibanga lokuma.

 Aphinde andise ukwakheka kokushisa futhi angandisa ingozi yokwehluleka kwamathayi.

 Amathayi kufanele ahlolwe njalo ukuze athole ukujula kwethayi kanye nokucindezela komoya okwanele.

 Ithayi elihle lisiza ukugcina ukubamba, ikakhulukazi ezimweni ezimanzi.

category: Ukuphepha Kwezimoto, Amaphutha kanye Nezisekelo Zokulungisa
description:
Izibani zemoto kumele zisebenze ebusuku futhi noma nini lapho ukubonakala kungabonakali kahle.

 Izibani ezisebenzayo zikusiza ukuthi ubone izingozi futhi zisize abanye abasebenzisi bomgwaqo ukuthi bakubone.

 Izibani zamabhuleki zibalulekile ngoba zixwayisa abanye abashayeli ukuthi uyehlisa noma uyama.

 Izibani zamabhuleki ezingasebenzi kahle zandisa ingozi yokuphahlazeka kwemoto ngemuva.

category: Ukuphepha Kwezimoto, Amaphutha kanye Nezisekelo Zokulungisa
description:
Umshayeli unesibopho sokuqinisekisa ukuthi imoto ifanelekile ukuba semgwaqweni.

 Ukuhlolwa njalo kanye nokulungiswa kusiza ekutholeni nasekulungiseni izinkinga zokuphepha kusenesikhathi.

category: Ukuqwashisa Ngemithwalo, Ukudonsa kanye Nezimoto Ezinzima
description:
Imithwalo kumele iboshwe ukuze ingakwazi ukuwa noma ukuhamba futhi idale ingozi kwabanye abasebenzisi bomgwaqo.

 Umthwalo ongavikelekile ungabangela ukuphahlazeka, ukulimala, kanye nomonakalo.

 Uma umthwalo ubekwe phezulu kakhulu noma ungalingani, ukuzinza kwemoto kungancishiswa.

 Lokhu kwandisa ingozi yokugingqika kanye nokulahlekelwa ukulawula.

 Ukulayisha imoto ngokweqile kunganciphisa ukusebenza kokubhuleka kanye nokuphatha.

 Kungandisa futhi ukucindezeleka kwethayi kanye nokumiswa, okwandisa ingozi yokuphahlazeka.

 Uma umthwalo uphuma ngemuva kwemoto, kumele uboshwe futhi ubonakale uma kudingeka.

 Imithwalo ephumayo engavikelekile kahle ingashaya abanye abasebenzisi bomgwaqo noma iwele emgwaqweni.

category: Ukuqwashisa Ngemithwalo, Ukudonsa kanye Nezimoto Ezinzima
description:
Ukudonsa i-trailer kwandisa ibanga lokuma ngoba imoto inesisindo esengeziwe sokunciphisa ijubane.

 Abashayeli kufanele banike isikhala esengeziwe futhi babhuleke kusenesikhathi.

 Ngaphambi kokudonsa, abashayeli kufanele bahlole i-coupling, izibani ze-trailer, iketanga lokuphepha, nokuthi umthwalo uphephile.

 Ukudonsa amaphutha kungaholela ekuqhekekeni noma ezingozini.

 Uma i-trailer iqala ukunyakazisa, impendulo ephephile iwukunciphisa i-accelerator bese uqhubeka nokuqondisa.

 Ukubhuleka noma ukusheshisa kanzima kungenza ukunyakazisa kube kubi kakhulu.

category: Ukuqwashisa Ngemithwalo, Ukudonsa kanye Nezimoto Ezinzima
description:
Izimoto ezisindayo zidinga isikhathi eside kakhulu ukuze zime kunezimoto.

 Ukunqamula phambi kweloli kususa isikhala sokuma kwalo futhi kungabangela izingozi ezinkulu.

 Amaloli anezindawo ezinkulu ezingaboni eduze kwawo nangemuva kwawo ngqo.

 Gwema ukushayela kulezi zindawo ngoba umshayeli angase angakuboni.

 Amaloli angadinga isikhala esengeziwe futhi angajika, ikakhulukazi eduze kwezindawo zokuhlangana.

 Akuphephile ukudlula iloli ngaphambi nje kokuhlangana kwezindawo.
